nodes.categoryHTML:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters
nodes.itemHTML: • libadalangstars122 - Libadalang is a library for parsing and semantic analysis of Ada code. It is meant as a building block for integration into other tools (IDE, static analyzers, etc).
• adaglstars7 - Multiplatform Ada/OpenGL bindings (ported to native/OpenGL, A2JS/WebGL and WASM/WebGL).
• ada-vscodestars1 - Basic syntax highlighting for Ada and GPR.
• ncurses-ada95 - Ada95 bindings for ncurses.
• record-fluxstars86 - RecordFlux: Toolset for the formal specification of messages and the generation of verifiable binary parsers and message generators in SPARK.
• ada-crypto-librarystars84 - This is a crypto library for Ada with a nice API and is written for the i386 and x86_64 hardware architecture.
• spark-naclstars81 - SPARK 2014 re-implementation of the TweetNaCl crypto library.
• xml-ez - Library for emitting XML from Ada programs.
• axmppstars7 - With the AXMPP library you can connect to a Jabber server to send and receive messages.
• zanyblue - An Ada package allowing the externalization of application messages into a properties file.
• a-stream-toolsstars1 - Stream utilities for Ada2005 and 2012.
• em-brickstars0 - emBRICK driver and support for emBRICK in Ada.
• micro-tem-pistars2 - Raspberry Pi using a BBC Micro:Bit as temperature sensor.
• covid-19-simulatorstars11 - Multi engine/algorithms COVID-19 simulator. Ada, Qt code under the hood.

• ada-magic - SofCheck AdaMagic is ACATS validated and certified Ada compiler targeting C and/or C++ (4 command line switches for fine tuning). ObjectAda and several other commercial compilers share engine with AdaMagic. MapuSoft distributes AdaMagic as integral component of AppCOE.
• Copybara Actionstars64 - Move and transform code between repositories (ideal to maintain several repos from one monorepo).
• dtls-fuzzerstars18 - A Java tool which performs protocol state fuzzing of DTLS servers.
• FANS: Fuzzing Android Native System Services via Automated Interface Analysis, 2020
• Analysis of DTLS Implementations Using Protocol State Fuzzing, 2020
• EcoFuzz: Adaptive Energy-Saving Greybox Fuzzing as a Variant of the Adversarial Multi-Armed Bandit, 2020
• Fuzzing Error Handling Code using Context-Sensitive Software Fault Injection, 2020
• FuzzGen: Automatic Fuzzer Generation, 2020
• ParmeSan: Sanitizer-guided Greybox Fuzzing, 2020
• SpecFuzz: Bringing Spectre-type vulnerabilities to the surface, 2020
• FuzzGuard: Filtering out Unreachable Inputs in Directed Grey-box Fuzzing through Deep Learning, 2020
• Montage: A Neural Network Language Model-Guided JavaScript Engine Fuzzer, 2020
• GREYONE: Data Flow Sensitive Fuzzing, 2020

• zeromq-adastars35 - Binding to the ZeroMQ comunications-library.

• weechat-emojistars1 - A WeeChat plug-in written in Ada 2012 that displays emoji.
